mapper.sql:
WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
AND b.category = #{category}
AND (b.target_age_min IS NULL OR b.target_age_min <= #{age}) AND (b.target_age_max IS NULL OR b.target_age_max >= #{age})
AND (b.deadline IS NULL OR b.deadline >= CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.title, b.category, b.target_age_min, b.target_age_max, b.description, b.host, b.benefit_summary, b.target_income, b.target_region, b.apply_url, b.deadline, b.source, (b.deadline IS NOT NULL AND b.deadline < CURRENT_DATE) AS expired, (b.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS is_new, COALESCE(b.view_count, 0) AS view_count FROM benefits b
ORDER BY (b.deadline IS NULL) ASC, b.deadline ASC NULLS LAST, b.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.category, b.target_age_min, b.target_age_max, b.description, b.host, b.benefit_summary, b.target_income, b.target_region, b.apply_url, b.deadline, b.source, (b.deadline IS NOT NULL AND b.deadline < CURRENT_DATE) AS expired, (b.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS is_new, COALESCE(b.view_count, 0) AS view_count, b.created_at FROM benefits b WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.category, b.target_age_min, b.target_age_max, b.description, b.host, b.benefit_summary, b.target_income, b.target_region, b.apply_url, b.deadline, b.source, FALSE AS expired, (b.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS is_new, COALESCE(b.view_count, 0) AS view_count FROM benefits b WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL AND (b.deadline IS NULL OR b.deadline >= CURRENT_DATE)
AND (b.target_age_min IS NULL OR b.target_age_min <= #{age}) AND (b.target_age_max IS NULL OR b.target_age_max >= #{age})
ORDER BY (b.deadline IS NULL) ASC, b.deadline ASC NULLS LAST, b.id DESC LIMIT 20
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO benefits ( external_id, title, category, target_age_min, target_age_max, description, host, benefit_summary, target_income, target_region, apply_url, deadline, source ) VALUES
( #{b.externalId}, #{b.title}, #{b.category}, #{b.targetAgeMin}, #{b.targetAgeMax}, #{b.description}, #{b.host}, #{b.benefitSummary}, #{b.targetIncome}, #{b.targetRegion}, #{b.applyUrl}, #{b.deadline}, #{b.source} )
ON CONFLICT (external_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, category = EXCLUDED.category, description = EXCLUDED.description, host = EXCLUDED.host, benefit_summary= EXCLUDED.benefit_summary, target_income = EXCLUDED.target_income, target_region = EXCLUDED.target_region, apply_url = EXCLUDED.apply_url, deadline = EXCLUDED.deadline, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE benefits SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
